data.body:
Goal:
Add a new `kno doctor` check named `cold_tier_imbalance` that detects repos where the cold_catalog has entries while hot count is below the target (100). `kno doctor --fix` rehydrates cold knots back to hot, newest-first by `updated_at`, capped at `100 - hot_count` (so we refill toward the target without over-stuffing). Scope: current repo only; cross-project doctor iteration is tracked in a separate knot.

Motivation: the 8aba cold-tier policy loosening means sometimes historical over-archival leaves a repo with 50 cold / 10 hot. We want a one-liner (`kno doctor --fix`) to rebalance.

Reuse: `db::list_cold_catalog`, existing `app.rehydrate(id)` (which already bumps `updated_at` and deletes the cold entry per 8aba). No new DB tables or columns.

Verification:
1. Seed a test DB with 10 hot + 50 cold_catalog entries. Run `kno doctor`. Expect one warning line: `cold_tier_imbalance: ⚠ 10 hot / 50 cold; run doctor --fix to rehydrate up to 90`.
2. Seed 10 hot + 50 cold. Run `kno doctor --fix`. Expect: 50 rehydrated (cap is 100-10=90, but cold is 50, so all 50 move). After, `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knot_hot` == 60; `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cold_catalog` == 0.
3. Seed 10 hot + 200 cold. Run `kno doctor --fix`. Expect: 90 rehydrated (capped at 100-10). After: 100 hot, 110 cold.
4. Rehydrated knots are the 90 newest-by-`updated_at` from cold_catalog.
5. Seed 100 hot + 5 cold. Run `kno doctor`. Expect: no warning (hot_count not below target — nothing to do).
6. Seed 120 hot + 0 cold. Run `kno doctor`. Expect: no warning (no cold to worry about).
7. Seed 10 hot + 50 cold. Run `kno doctor --json`. Expect a `cold_tier_imbalance` key with status and counts.
8. Each rehydrated knot has `updated_at` within 1s of now.

Constraints:
- Scope: current repo only. Cross-project iteration is a separate knot.
- Do NOT rehydrate when `hot_count >= 100` regardless of cold count — the target is 100 and only bloat-reducing flows apply above it.
- Reuse `app.rehydrate`; do not reimplement.
- Integrate with the existing doctor check registration pattern.
- Use `kno rehydrate` events where they make sense; do not bypass the event stream.
- Maintain the file size limit (<500 lines) and 95% coverage.
data.title: Add cold_tier_imbalance check to kno doctor with --fix rehydration
